content:
What if I currently have health coverage?

You’ll be asked if you (or anyone else on your application) currently have health coverage. Some people who already have health insurance can still get more ...

How do I use my Exemption Certificate Number (ECN)?

If you get a notice of exemption eligibility from the Marketplace, you'll also get an Exemption Certificate Number (ECN).

Why am I being asked to enter my preferred spoken and written language?

Entering this information will help the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) better understand and improve the health and health care for all A...

What information will I need to enter?

Once you’ve created a Marketplace account and started your application, you’ll need to enter some personal information.

Do I need to answer “optional” questions?

You must answer all questions and items on your application unless they’re marked optional.

What health coverage do I have?

Select from a list of plan or programs you may be enrolled in.
